titleStmt.title: SII 29.14: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 14. (A.R. No. B. 536 of 1961-62.) BALLAṬGI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab in two pieces kept near the Paikar-bāvi.

It states that king Chālukya Jagadēkamalla while camping at Poṭṭalakeṟe, made a grant to god Chandēśvara of Bhattagrāma Baḷḷaniṭṭage for worship and offerings, music, singing and dancing and for feeding of ascetics in the temple. It is said that the grant was made at the instance of Sadyōjātā Paṇḍita. The record informs that Baḷḷaniṭṭage was situated in the division of Mosaḷīkal-300, a kaṁpaṇa of Eḍadoṟe-2000.
The record is dated Śaka 958, Dhātu, Pushya śu. 3, Thursday, uttarāyaṇa sankrānti. It corresponds to 1036 A.D., December 23, Thursday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī
pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya ku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa
malladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛ
ddhi pravarddhamānamācandrārkka tāraṁ salluttamire
poṭṭalakeṟeya nelevīḍinōḷ sakavarṣa
958 neya dhāta(tu) saṁvatsarada puṣya suddha
3 bṛhaspati vāradaṁduttarāyaṇa saṁ
krāntiya parvvanimittadiṁ vādigā(ga)ja kēsari
sadyōjāta paṁḍita rdharmōpadēśaṁgeyye śrī
majjagadēkamalladēvar Eḍadoṟe yircchāsirada
da kaṁpaṇaṁ mosaḷikal mūnūṟaṟa baḷiya bha
ttagrāme baḷḷanittageya candēśvaradēvara
kkaṁ nṛtya gītātōdyavāda
kkaṁ tapōdha(na) Rest is broken and lost.
Digital edition of SII 29.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
